issues.title: #1: Shadowed inner app function confuses readers; outer function
issues.invariant: Nested function must not shadow outer function name in same enclosing scope

issues.title: #2: Returns PARTIAL when path matches but method doesn't; semant
#4: NoMatchFound caught silently in loop; caller can't distingui
#5: Method validation duplicated (path in matches, method in han
issues.invariant: All routing criteria (path and method) must be validated in matches() to consolidate validation logic and clarify the contract

issues.title: #6: Mutates path_params dict in-place; function name suggests pu
issues.invariant: Function must not mutate caller's data structures

issues.title: #7: Uses assert for convertor validation; disabled with -O flag,
issues.invariant: Validation must not use assert; must use explicit exceptions to survive Python -O flag

issues.title: #8: Duplicated params error message is grammatically awkward ("D
issues.invariant: Parameter names in error messages must be properly quoted for clarity and grammatical correctness

issues.title: #9: Exception message conflates "name not found" with "params in
issues.invariant: Exception message must distinguish between missing route name and invalid parameters error conditions.

issues.title: #10: Treats lifespan scope as unroutable (sends WebSocketClose);
issues.invariant: Lifespan scope type must be explicitly handled before route matching to prevent it from being treated as an unroutable request.

issues.title: #11: Assert is used instead of explicit raise; Python -O optimiza
issues.invariant: Security-critical input validation must use explicit raise, not assert (which is disabled when Python runs with -O optimization flag)

issues.title: #12: Potential infinite redirect loop if routes match opposite-sl
issues.invariant: Routes without explicit trailing slashes must match both with and without trailing slashes to prevent infinite redirect loops between opposite-slash patterns

issues.title: #13: Trailing slash silently stripped with .rstrip("/"); mount pa
#14: Exponential recursion depth for deeply nested Mounts; no ear
#15: Infinite recursion possible if circular Mount nesting exists
#16: Assert for scope type validation; disableable with -O, fails
issues.invariant: Runtime validation of critical ASGI scope contracts must not be disableable by Python -O flag and must provide clear, actionable error messages

issues.title: #17: Assumes self.methods is iterable for join; never validated i
issues.invariant: Input parameter `methods` must be validated as an iterable collection type before iteration.

issues.title: #1: Missing OPTIONS support. The code enforces method constraint
issues.invariant: HTTP OPTIONS requests must be allowed on all routes to introspect allowed methods, regardless of method constraints.

issues.title: #2: PARTIAL match doesn't coordinate with redirect. The redirect
#3: Mounted routes hide method constraints. A Mount compiles pat
issues.invariant: HTTP routing must return 405 Method Not Allowed with RFC 7231 Allow header when a path matches but the request method is not in the route's allowed methods set, not 404 Not Found.

issues.title: #4: url_path_for doesn't validate method context. You can genera
#5: HEAD auto-addition is implicit. When methods include "GET",
#6: Exception doesn't report which constraint failed. When url_p
#7: Redirect doesn't account for method constraints during PATH
#8: scope["router"] doesn't help with parent routes. The router
issues.invariant: Parent router references must be preserved when scope is updated with nested router data to enable url_path_for() lookups across route hierarchy

issues.title: #9: Path parameters and endpoint parameter names can conflict si
issues.invariant: Path parameter names must not silently conflict with endpoint function parameter names

issues.title: #10: Host-based routing is compiled but never enforced. The funct
issues.invariant: Host pattern metadata must be preserved in the compiled regex object for route matching enforcement

issues.title: #11: Duplicate method validation. Route.matches() checks methods
#12: Malformed convertor regex isn't validated at registration. I
issues.invariant: Convertor regex must be validated at route registration time, not deferred until path compilation fails

issues.title: #13: Mount's "path" catch-all parameter is popped before children
#14: PARTIAL match handling is only correct for methods. BaseRout
issues.invariant: PARTIAL match handling must be explicit in BaseRoute.__call__() to clarify that only FULL and PARTIAL (method mismatches from Route) are delegated to handle()

issues.title: #15: Redirect slashes feature silently changes semantics. When re
issues.invariant: Expensive behavior requiring body retransmission on 307 redirects must be explicitly opted-in, not silently enabled by default

issues.title: #1: Missing OPTIONS introspection
issues.invariant: All explicitly-declared HTTP method sets must include OPTIONS for RFC 7231 introspection compliance

issues.title: #2: Redirect + method interaction
issues.invariant: Trailing-slash redirects must not be applied to non-idempotent HTTP methods like POST that may have side effects

issues.title: #3: Mount hides constraints
issues.invariant: Path parameter validation must only apply to function endpoints, not app endpoints, to prevent Mount from breaking on non-callable endpoint inspection

issues.title: #4: url_path_for lacks method context
issues.invariant: Route URL path resolution must accept HTTP method context parameter to resolve ambiguous multi-method routes

issues.title: #5: HEAD auto-addition implicit
#6: Exception lacks failure reason
issues.invariant: Exception messages must include the actual parameter values, not just names, to reveal the reason for failure.

issues.title: #7: Redirect logic ambiguous
issues.invariant: Path validation and modification must use the same path source to avoid ambiguity between computed route_path and the actual redirect scope path.

issues.title: #8: scope["router"] can't see parent
#9: Parameter name conflicts undetected
issues.invariant: Parameter name conflicts must be detected before regex patterns with duplicate named groups are constructed

issues.title: #10: Host-based routing dead code
issues.invariant: Attributes set but never read downstream are dead code and must be removed.

issues.title: #11: Duplicate method checking
issues.invariant: Duplicate methods=None checks must be consolidated to single location after endpoint type is determined

issues.title: #12: Convertor regex validation missing
issues.invariant: Convertor regex validation must catch all exceptions (missing attribute, wrong type, invalid pattern)

issues.title: #13: Mount path parameter implicit
issues.invariant: Path parameters must be explicitly extracted before endpoint type discrimination to ensure all endpoint types (function, Mount, ASGI) have direct access to parameter metadata.

issues.title: #14: PARTIAL assumptions implicit
issues.invariant: PARTIAL path matches must carry path remainder information in child_scope for nested routing to function correctly.

issues.title: #15: Redirect retransmits large bodies
issues.invariant: Redirect responses must use status codes that prevent clients from retransmitting request bodies
